decisions.rationale: Self-contained question asking when the Postal Vote BD app confirmation code arrives, matching OTP/code delivery timing.
Asks how long it takes for the code to arrive after resend; still clearly about code delivery time.
Directly asks how many minutes OTP delivery usually takes in the Election Commission postal vote app.
Clearly asks whether users must wait a few minutes to receive the Postal Vote BD OTP.
Asks whether the OTP reaching the inbox should be expected to take a few minutes; fits delivery-time intent.
Uses 'one-time password' as OTP and asks how long it takes to reach the phone; matches tag.
Directly asks how many minutes to wait to receive the Postal Vote BD OTP.
Asks whether the postal vote OTP arrival takes a long or short time, which is a delivery-time question.
Self-contained question about the arrival time of OTP on the postal vote platform.
Directly asks the timeframe for OTP arrival in the postal vote app.
Asks whether receiving the SMS OTP can be delayed by a few minutes; clearly about OTP delivery time.
Asks the OTP delivery window in minutes for the Election Commission postal vote app.
Asks whether OTP arrives immediately or with slight delay; clean delivery-time intent.
Uses 'one-time password' to mean OTP and asks how much time should be allowed to receive it.
Asks how much delay is usually seen in receiving the postal vote app OTP.
Asks approximately how many minutes it takes to get the verification code from the postal vote app.
Directly asks how long it may take to receive the postal vote app verification code.
Asks generally what the OTP delivery time is in the postal voting system.
Asks how long an SMS code arrival may be delayed in Postal Vote BD; fits code delivery timing.
Asks how many minutes to wait for the postal vote OTP message on the phone.
Asks how long to wait in the postal vote app before receiving OTP; matches tag intent.
Asks the timeframe for receiving OTP in the EC postal vote service.
Asks whether getting the code in the postal voting app can take a few minutes; clean delivery-time query.
Directly asks how many minutes it takes to receive OTP in the postal vote service.

result.packet_rationale: All rows are self-contained questions about how long OTP, verification, confirmation, SMS, or one-time password codes take to arrive or be received in the Postal Vote BD/app/service context. None concern password reset or password update timing, and no row is too generic or context-dependent for this tag.
